data.content: Shipment complete. All 4 child knots shipped: b92e2743f328 (skills prompts delivery-target-explicit language), 2cce51f69f56 (compatibility workflow per-profile prompt rendering), f992afcc1201 (loom prompt fixtures), 38c7e82c9b7c (profile-specific delivery target tests). Rebased top commit aecdb6e4c875. CI green (run 23859546344, 815 tests passed). No-PR profiles no longer reference PR artifacts; PR profiles explicitly require PR metadata; each profile's review/shipment target deterministic by delivery mode.
